step_rationale: Gut metabolite enhances platelet responsiveness; associated with plaque rupture and thrombosis.
mechanism: PAGln derived from microbiota metabolism promotes platelet activation and thrombotic response, increasing MI risk in rupture-prone plaques.

references.title: Comprehensive age-specific metabolic phenotyping in myocardial infarction.
Association between Intestinal Flora Metabolites and Coronary Artery Vulnerable Plaque Characteristics in Coronary Heart Disease.
references.journal: British journal of hospital medicine (London, England : 2005)

references.title: Phenylacetyl glutamine (PAGln) enhances cardiomyocyte death after myocardial infarction through β1 adrenergic receptor.
A Cardiovascular Disease-Linked Gut Microbial Metabolite Acts via Adrenergic Receptors.
